AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON JUL-28-1994

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYLOSIS, MAX BAYLOSIS, ANGELITA POSAS, ANGELITA POSAS, LEONIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVICH, HEATHER KOGER ALAMO RENT-A-CAR, INC. $16,893.35 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,893.35, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR--JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: $3087 TO MAX BAYLOSIS, $4122 TO ANGELITA BAYLOSIS, $5613 TO VICTORIANO POSAS, AND $4071 TO LEONIDA POSAS. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS
